title: Smoky Russian-Style Beef Kebabs
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring smoky beef kebabs cooked to perfection. Serve with a side of crusty bread and a green salad for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: smoky paprika
ingredients.notes: Available at most spice stores or online

instructions: Thread beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together smoky paprika, garlic powder, black pepper, and salt (if using).
Brush olive oil onto kebabs and sprinkle with spice mixture.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Remove from heat and let rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Serve with lemon wedges on the side.
